title: Craft Ores
description: You can now craft ores for decoration! Normal ores, deepslate ores and nether ores. It's balanced, of course!
body:
# Craft Ores!

With this datapack you can *craft minecraft ores*, including normal, deepslate and nether ores!
Ever needed a diamond ore for *building* or *decoration*, but didn't have silktouch? No problem! With *8* items of the ore needed (e.g. diamond) and *1* of the stone needed (e.g. deepstale), you can decorate without limits!
